changeSet.author: asavin
changeSet.sql: alter table results.arrangements drop constraint ck_status; alter table results.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('RUNNING', 'FINISHED', 'UPLOADING'));

rollback.sql: alter table results.arrangements drop constraint ck_status; alter table results.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('RUNNING', 'FINISHED'));
